channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Defense Responds to Calls for Voluntary Disclosure of Duterte's Bank Records
item.description: The article discusses the Philippine Defense Department's response to questions regarding the voluntary disclosure of former President Duterte's bank records. While the original title suggests a provo...

item.title: Cold Season Drives Increased Clothing Sales in Southern Highlands Regions
item.description: The cold season has significantly boosted clothing sales in the Southern Highlands of Tanzania, particularly in Iringa, Njombe, and Mbeya regions. Traders report higher demand for warm items like swea...

item.title: Fashola Criticizes Opposition For Lacking Credible Alternatives Ahead Of 2027 Elections
item.description: Former Lagos governor Babatunde Fashola has slammed opposition parties for failing to present credible alternatives ahead of the 2027 elections, accusing them of focusing solely on removing President ...

item.title: Rising temperatures threaten European holiday destinations
item.description: The article discusses the growing concern over climate change in Europe, highlighting how rising global temperatures are making extreme heatwaves more frequent and severe. It focuses on popular holida...

item.title: Rare helium nova reveals mysterious gas bullets from exploding star
item.description: Astronomers have discovered an unprecedented phenomenon originating from a rare stellar explosion in the Milky Way. The event, known as V445 Puppis, is a helium nova that produced high-speed gas clump...

item.title: Orcas use ramming technique to process sunfish carcasses, study suggests
item.description: Researchers have documented orcas in the Gulf of California using a unique predation strategy by ramming into sunfish carcasses, causing them to fragment. Footage shows adult orcas coordinating to hol...

item.title: Tom Hiddleston's Pompeii docudrama: A mix of drama, history, and cringe
item.description: This review critiques the National Geographic docudrama 'Pompeii: Out of Time With Tom Hiddleston', starring Tom Hiddleston as a narrator recounting the catastrophic eruption of Mount Vesuvius in AD79...

item.title: Home Affairs Detains Adetshina’s Mother Over Illegal Residence and Child Protection Concerns
item.description: The South African Home Affairs department, collaborating with police, detained Anabela Rungo, the mother of Miss Universe Africa and Oceania Chidimma Adetshina, for illegally residing in the country. ...

item.title: Lethbridge's Crime Severity Index Ranks 6th in Canada Despite Police Efforts to Improve Safety
item.description: Lethbridge, Alberta, has ranked sixth highest in Canada for crime severity according to Statistics Canada's 2025 data, despite a 13% overall crime rate decrease. The city's Crime Severity Index (CSI) ...

item.title: Khaligraph Jones Shares Weight Loss Journey Through Fasting and Ketogenic Diet
item.description: Khaligraph Jones has stunned fans with his dramatic 47kg weight loss, revealing a strict regimen of fasting and a ketogenic diet. The rapper shared a video showcasing his transformation, explaining he...

item.title: Philippine and Chinese Foreign Ministers Address Rising Bilateral Tensions in Manila Meeting
item.description: Philippine Foreign Secretary Maria Theresa Lazaro and Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi held their first minister-level meeting in two years in Manila, highlighting escalating political and maritime te...

item.title: Government Allocates N30bn for Palaces and Religious Projects Amid Budget Concerns
item.description: The Nigerian government has allocated N30.15 billion in the 2026 budget for constructing, renovating, and furnishing palaces and religious institutions like churches and mosques. This allocation has s...

item.title: Indian Prime Minister Addresses Student Protests Over Exam Fraud and Government Response
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi has pledged stringent measures against those involved in exam fraud, which has sparked widespread student protests in India. The protests, led by the social media-driven C...

item.title: Richard Marles' Fishing Controversy, Musk's Odyssey Movie, and Media Rankings Update

item.title: Early Detection of Chronic Kidney Disease: The Importance of Testing
item.description: The article highlights the dangers of chronic kidney disease (CKD), often referred to as a 'silent killer' due to its lack of symptoms. Dr. Alan Kaplan’s personal experience illustrates how undiagnose...

item.title: A 1867 Photograph of the James Brothers and Fletch Taylor: Bonds Forged in Civil War Guerrilla Warfare
item.description: This article analyzes a rare 1867 photograph capturing Frank and Jesse James alongside Fletch Taylor, Confederate guerrillas who fought in Missouri's guerrilla bands during the Civil War. The image, t...

item.title: Star Trek actor Anson Mount surprises Joy Behar with unexpected on-air kiss
item.description: Star Trek actor Anson Mount, 53, made headlines during a recent episode of The View by surprising host Joy Behar, 83, with an unexpected on-air kiss. The incident occurred during a live segment, spark...

item.title: CJP Protest Escalates with Clashes and Metro Closures
item.description: The CJP protest in Delhi witnessed heightened tensions on July 23, 2026, with clashes between protesters and police on Sansad Marg. The Delhi Police reported injuries to five officers, including two A...

item.title: Constitutional Case Highlights Lawyer-Client Confidentiality Issues as Lissu Examines Ukonga Officer-in-Charge
item.description: The article details the third day of a constitutional case centered on lawyer-client confidentiality, where Lissu, a prominent legal figure, cross-examines the officer-in-charge of Ukonga. The case in...

item.title: Man Detained in M-Pesa Shop After Alleged Fraud
item.description: A man was detained inside an M-Pesa shop in Ongata Rongai after allegedly defrauding the agent of KSh 10,000. The incident, captured on video by social media personality Bruce Sniper, shows a dense cr...
